title: Police rescue abducted victim - suspect appears in court
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Hawks’ Kidnapping Task Team, working in collaboration with the Amathole SAPS District, has rescued a foreign national who was allegedly kidnapped at the Mfula Administrative Area in Willowvale on 25 August.","html":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Hawks’ Kidnapping Task Team, working in collaboration with the Amathole SAPS District, has rescued a foreign national who was allegedly kidnapped at the Mfula Administrative Area in Willowvale on 25 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The incident shocked the local community after the suspects reportedly shot and killed a 61-year-old bystander at a shop during the abduction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The victim was declared dead on the scene.","html":"The victim was declared dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspects allegedly forced their target into a white Toyota single-cab bakkie with a CAA registration number.","html":"The suspects allegedly forced their target into a white Toyota single-cab bakkie with a CAA registration number."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A ransom demand was later made, prompting the case to be referred to the Directorate for Priority Crime Investigation (DPCI) for intensive follow-up.","html":"A ransom demand was later made, prompting the case to be referred to the Directorate for Priority Crime Investigation (DPCI) for intensive follow-up."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Through a co-ordinated effort between the police and the community, the suspect's vehicle was traced to an abandoned house at Mfula A/A. Law enforcement teams immediately responded.","html":"Through a co-ordinated effort between the police and the community, the suspect's vehicle was traced to an abandoned house at Mfula A/A. Law enforcement teams immediately responded."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On arrival, officers spotted the vehicle and the suspects fled on foot into nearby bushes.","html":"On arrival, officers spotted the vehicle and the suspects fled on foot into nearby bushes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Police searched the vehicle and found the kidnapped victim alive and unharmed.","html":"Police searched the vehicle and found the kidnapped victim alive and unharmed."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The victim was safely reunited with his family. An AK-47 rifle with live ammunition was also recovered from the vehicle and seized for further investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ongoing investigation led to the arrest of a 29-year-old suspect on 29 August. He faces charges of murder and kidnapping.","html":"Ongoing investigation led to the arrest of a 29-year-old suspect on 29 August. He faces charges of murder and kidnapping."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspect appeared in the Willowvale Magistrate’s Court on 1 September. The matter was postponed to 9 September for a formal bail application.","html":"The suspect appeared in the Willowvale Magistrate’s Court on 1 September. The matter was postponed to 9 September for a formal bail application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The accused remains in custody while investigations continue, with the Hawks pursuing all leads.","html":"The accused remains in custody while investigations continue, with the Hawks pursuing all leads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Police rescue abducted victim - suspect appears in court
